prompt: Architectural floor plan schematic for TREeS luxury restaurant in Wynwood Miami. Top-down professional blueprint showing 6 labeled zones: GREENHOUSE DINING HALL 2500sqft with skylights and living plant walls and 80 seats, SMOKE ROOM LOUNGE 800sqft with moroccan pillows and low couches, PRIVATE DINING 400sqft for 12 guests, OUTDOOR PATIO 1200sqft with string lights and tropical plants, CAFE AND RAW JUICERY 600sqft with espresso bar, LIVE MUSIC STAGE 500sqft elevated platform. Also show kitchen restrooms storage main entry. 70s bungalow meets futuristic. Clean blue architectural blueprint lines on white background with dimensions labeled and furniture layout.
